---
title: "Books"
---

An index of books and blogs mentioned — directly or indirectly — across the blog posts.

## Books

| Book | Author | Post |
|------|--------|------|
| *Adventures of a Cello* | Carlos Prieto | [Different Shades of Genius](posts/2026-04-03-different-shades-of-genius/index.qmd) |
| *Atomic Habits* | James Clear | [Relying on Side Effects](posts/2026-05-31-relying-on-side-effects/index.qmd) |
| *Harry Potter and the Half-Blood Prince* | J.K. Rowling | [Tortured Neighbours Association](posts/2026-03-15-tortured-neighbours-association/index.qmd) |
| *Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone* | J.K. Rowling | [Tortured Neighbours Association](posts/2026-03-15-tortured-neighbours-association/index.qmd) |
| *Hillbilly Elegy* | J.D. Vance | [Strolling and Scrolling](posts/2026-02-11-strolling-and-scrolling/index.qmd) |
| *Madeline* | Ludwig Bemelmans | [Stamps, Strings and Strengths](posts/2026-05-16-stamps-strings-and-strengths/index.qmd) |
| *Nexus* | Yuval Noah Harari | [Survival of the Diversified](posts/2026-05-01-survival-of-the-diversified/index.qmd) |
| *On the Origin of Species* | Charles Darwin | [Survival of the Diversified](posts/2026-05-01-survival-of-the-diversified/index.qmd) |
| *Stradivari's Genius* | Toby Faber | [Different Shades of Genius](posts/2026-04-03-different-shades-of-genius/index.qmd) |
| *The Intelligent Investor* | Benjamin Graham | [Buffer of Patience](posts/2026-06-14-buffer-of-patience/index.qmd) |
| *The Paradox of Choice* | Barry Schwartz | [Strolling and Scrolling](posts/2026-02-11-strolling-and-scrolling/index.qmd) |
| *The Psychology of Money* | Morgan Housel | [Buffer of Patience](posts/2026-06-14-buffer-of-patience/index.qmd) |
| *The Truth* | Terry Pratchett | [Relying on Side Effects](posts/2026-05-31-relying-on-side-effects/index.qmd) |
| *Thinking, Fast and Slow* | Daniel Kahneman | [Tortured Neighbours Association](posts/2026-03-15-tortured-neighbours-association/index.qmd) |

## Blogs

| Blog | Author | Post |
|------|--------|------|
| *Best Interest* | Jesse Cramer | [A Delicious Contradiction](posts/2026-01-30-delicious-contradiction/index.qmd) |
| *The Tail End* | Tim Urban | [Countable Events](posts/2026-04-18-countable-events/index.qmd) |
